title: Dark Coffee GUI
description: A warm and dark reimagination of the GUI in a fancy, coffee inspired palette
body:
![Banner for Dark Coffee GUI](https://imgur.com/OtRyguK.png)

# Dark Coffee GUI

[![Modrinth](https://imgur.com/2thX8gE.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dark-coffe-gui) [![Curseforge](https://imgur.com/BBPSAq4.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/dark-coffee-gui) [![Twitter](https://imgur.com/qfz2Uz7.png)](https://x.com/restless_pip?s=20) [![Kofi](https://imgur.com/EWBrs6h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/restlesspip)

This resourcepack reimagines Minecraft's Graphical User Interface with a warm, cozy and dark style, taking vanilla's more simple design and transforming it into something fancier and more visually appealing, perfect for those late night sessions.

It features a soothing coffee color for all inventories, recolored text to better fit the color scheme (works better on newer versions), a brand new hotbar with remade icons for hearts, armor and food, as well as special skull shaped hearts for the hardcore players.

![Feature showcase](https://imgur.com/GSLlN7m.png)

## Compatibility

Made for most versions of Minecraft. Support will mainly come for the latest versions of Minecraft, I'm the only one maintaining this pack and I don't have that much time.

Latest versions from 1.21.2 have more features thanks to Mojang's changes on how resourcepacks work, a custom highlight texture, custom bundle inventory, custom scrollbars for menus, custom tooltip frame and better looking buttons. There might be some mods to port these to older versions, if I have time I could try and look into it.

The text recolor works with shaders that don't work on older versions, so from version 1.16 and below, the text will be white and only work in English US. There are no plans to implement more language support at the moment since it's pretty tedious to do.

## Mod support

Mod support is now a thing!! It works as a separate resourcepack that goes above the default pack. Check out Modded Coffee GUI's page to see what mods are supported and which are coming in the future.

[![ModdedCoffeeGUI](https://imgur.com/dsTOTHS.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modded-coffee-gui)

## Extras

Would you like a hand icon instead of a shield for the inventory? Maybe you like the hotbar but don't want the rest? Do you not like the coffee beans as hunger bar? Check out Dark Coffee Extras!!

[![DarkCoffeeGUIExtras](https://imgur.com/jWj7TjS.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dark-coffee-extras)

## Important

Feel free to give feedback and report any issues on Github. Updates might be slow but I'll try to work fast if it's something important.

Do not distribute or republish anywhere else, the only page that offers this resourcepack for now is Modrinth, Curseforge and PlanetMinecraft, and only by me. If you see any version of this resourcepack anywhere else, report it and please, do not download, it was uploaded without my supervision and could be dangerous.
****
